Response 221227665

Renovation of 11,000 Square Feet of Cleanroom, Landing of 4 New Applied

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Renovation of 11,000 square feet of cleanroom, landing of 4 new Applied Materials cluster processing tools in the shared space plus one tool in Applied Materials private space.

Question

Activity Start Date / End Date

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question

Public Service or Community Engagement

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

People And Units

Question

ASU Faculty/Staff Involved

  • William Hollander (Marketing Content Specialist) - wahollan@gmail.com
  • Additional ASU collaborators from survey: Matt Marinella (Project SLEAC), Bob Nemanich (diamond processing) and Hongbin Yu.
  • ASU Institutional Relationship Manager: Not 100% sure but we think either Kevin Reinhart or Anthony Tam.

Question

Mutual Benefits

Partial evidence from ASU-authored response.
